misc: Always a gentleman despite occasionally losing his temper on the course
biography: Daniel, a familiar face at the Hector Trophée, hails from Oulujokilaakson Golfklubi ry and has been a consistent presence in the tournament, having participated in 7 previous editions. While victory in the Victor Trophy has eluded him, Daniel has twice tasted the ultimate success, claiming the Hector Trophée on two occasions.

Known for his competitive spirit, Daniel always comports himself as a gentleman, even when the pressure of the tournament occasionally causes him to lose his temper on the course. Despite not participating in Hector Trophée 2026, he remains an active figure in Hector events, his passion for the game undiminished.
